channel.title: Economy on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in Economy on Bali Kini

item.title: Bali Eyes Dubai & Singapore: Kura Kura SEZ Set to Become Indonesia's Financial Hub
item.description: Bali is making headlines once again — this time not just as a world-class tourist paradise, but as a contender for the title of Southeast Asia’s next major international financial center. The Kura Kura Bali Special Economic Zone (SEZ), located on Serangan Island in Denpasar, is being positioned by the Indonesian government to become the Indonesia Financial Center (IFC) — a bold ambition designed to rival the financial dominance of Dubai and Singapore.
